note: Frozen LIVE state. Superseded items (single full_name as the name field; v1 'backward compatible forever') are deliberately ABSENT — reporting them as current is a hallucination. Authored before the harness.

active_claims.what: the mobile client caches the API schema for 7 days, so schema changes propagate slowly to mobile users

active_constraints.what: the v1 API is supported only until Q3 and is then sunset

decisions.what: represent names as separate given_name and family_name; the single full_name field was deprecated and replaced

open_conflicts.what: full_name: the web team wants it kept as a computed read-only field vs the data team wants it removed entirely

open_questions.what: whether to version the API via an Accept header or via a URL path segment
